concerns.detail: Contains personal insults directed at critics including '小丑🤡一个' (clown), '破防了孩子' (triggered/butthurt), and '你是来找爹妈还是来找导师的？', which constitute pure personal attacks rather than substantive criticism of advising practices.
concerns.excerpt: 小丑🤡一个，大家都不理你不代表你可以一直乱咬人...你是来找爹妈还是来找导师的？

concerns.detail: Removal of substantive claims regarding a professor's inappropriate relationship with their PhD advisor and faculty warnings to prospective students, appearing to suppress specific observations about an advisor rather than performing cleanup.
concerns.excerpt:
曾和phd导师搞暧昧
（今年phd选offer就有国内的faculty 劝退）（去年也有）
